musicEgg.desc: 3 clicks on the logo... you've got instincts. This one's not for everyone.

featured.title: StrasTaRoute
featured.punch: Web & mobile platform to plan safety for sports events with interactive map, teams & equipment management, timeline.

problem.label: Problem
problem.text: Coordinate organizers, field teams and safety equipment (barriers, vehicles, warning points) along a route.

approach.label: My role
approach.text: Project lead & web developer. 4 repos: Web (Angular + Leaflet), Mobile (Expo), API (NestJS), CI (Docker).

result.label: Result
result.text: Interactive map (routes, zones, POIs), Gantt timeline for setup/teardown, PDF/CSV exports, mobile sync via QR code.

intro.body:
Academic and personal projects spanning mobile, web, backend and serious games.

Each project = a technology learned, a problem solved, a skill built.

StrasTaRoute.title: StrasTaRoute
StrasTaRoute.description: A mobile and web application to secure sports events in the Strasbourg Eurometropolis.
StrasTaRoute.longDescription: StrasTaRoute is an innovative application developed to secure sports events in the Strasbourg Eurometropolis. It allows organizers to plan secure routes, manage checkpoints and communicate in real-time with participants and security teams. The application integrates geolocation features, real-time alerts and incident management.

crashbandibooks.title: Crash BandiBooks
crashbandibooks.description: A serious game developed to illustrate the role of Data Librarians in research data management.
crashbandibooks.longDescription: Crash BandiBooks is an educational serious game developed in collaboration with the University of Strasbourg. The game helps players understand the crucial role of Data Librarians in managing, preserving and sharing research data. Through interactive missions, players learn best practices for data management, open science challenges and the importance of documentation.

jesso.title: Jesso
jesso.description: The management application for student associations.
jesso.longDescription: Jesso is a comprehensive management application for student associations. It allows managing members, events, treasury and internal communications. Developed to meet the specific needs of university associations, it simplifies daily management and promotes member engagement.

bingy.title: Bingy
bingy.description: Mobile app for creating TV series and movie watchlists.
bingy.longDescription: Bingy is a mobile application for creating and managing personalized watchlists for series and movies. It integrates the TMDB API to provide detailed content information, allows tracking progress and sharing recommendations with friends. The intuitive interface makes discovering new content easy.

golfit.title: GolfIT (WIP)
golfit.description: An app tracking your golf games and statistics.
golfit.longDescription: GolfIT is an application under development for golfers. It allows recording games, tracking detailed statistics (strokes, fairways hit, greens in regulation) and analyzing progress over time. The goal is to provide a complete tool to improve your game.

PlanMyRave.title: PlanMyRave (WIP)
PlanMyRave.description: Application web pour organiser vos prochaines sorties en festivals et concerts.
PlanMyRave.longDescription: PlanMyRave est une application web destinée aux amateurs de musique électronique. Elle permet de découvrir les prochains festivals et concerts, de planifier ses sorties, de partager des évènements avec ses amis et de gérer son budget. L'application intègre des fonctionnalités sociales pour connecter les passionnés de musique.

labyrinthe.title: Labyrinth
labyrinthe.description: The Labyrinth board game recreated in Java.
labyrinthe.longDescription: Digital recreation of the famous Labyrinth board game in Java. This project allows playing the classic game on computer with a graphical interface faithful to the original. It includes random maze generation, movement management and complete game logic for 2 to 4 players.

pookemon.title: POOkemon
pookemon.description: The Pokemon card game on your terminal! All coded in Java.
pookemon.longDescription: POOkemon is a command-line implementation of the Pokemon card game, entirely coded in Java. This project puts Object-Oriented Programming principles into practice with a complete system of battles, Pokemon types, attacks and special effects. A fun way to learn OOP!
